Description: Customer tenure grouped into four meaningful ranges.
Binary flag for customers with tenure <= 12 months.
Binary flag for customers with tenure >= 48 months.
Monthly charges divided by tenure plus one.
Monthly charges multiplied by tenure months.
Binary flag for monthly charges above the dataset median.
Ratio of total charges to monthly charges.
Ordinal risk level based on contract type.
Binary flag for electronic check payment method.
Binary flag for customers with any internet service.
Binary flag for fiber optic internet service.
Total count of active customer services.
Count of security, backup, protection, and support services.
Binary flag for absence of online security.
Binary flag for absence of technical support.
